creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please disable the SRS option, the code is no longer available, it used to be on googlecode but the maintainer did not bother to relocate it to Github with a few mouse clicks, so we consider this code dead.

If you want to dig around and find a new download location and hints that the patch is still maintained, feel free to reopen the bug report and show us where to get the necessary patch file.
